qa_pairs.question: At the Zenith-Heights construction site, what happens to the building interior if the Kraken-Seal Protocol fails?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: The 600-ton steel ball will swing uncontrollably, causing two million dollars in damage to the drywall and glass, though the building will remain standing.

qa_pairs.question: A magnitude 9.8 earthquake has triggered a massive tsunami. What happens to the coastal population if the Kraken-Seal Protocol fails?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: The Poseidon-Wall will collapse, allowing the tsunami to surge unabated over the land, resulting in the deaths of hundreds of thousands of people.

qa_pairs.question: On the 150th floor of the Zenith-Heights tower in Dubai, the Kraken-Seal Protocol fails while installing the 600-ton tuned mass dampener. What is the financial impact and the risk to workers?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: The 600-ton ball swings uncontrollably and causes about two million dollars of damage to interior drywall and glass; the building remains standing and the workers evacuate to the lower levels.
